options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: character
options.description:
Determines whether to play as Sora, Riku, or Both
0: Both
1: Sora Only
2: Riku Only

options.name: goal
options.description:
Win Condition
0: Defeat the Final Boss (Xemnas for Sora and Young Xehanort for Riku
1: Defeat All Superbosses (Secret Portals and Julius)

options.name: armored_ventus_nightmare
options.description:
If enabled, the win condition for the Final Boss goal is moved to AVN instead of Young Xehanort
This is ignored if the goal is Superbosses or the player chooses Sora as their character

options.name: recipe_reqs
options.description:
Number of Recipes needed to beat the game
Meow Wow and Komory Bat recipes are always required

options.name: recipes_in_pool
options.description:
Number of Recipes in the Item Pool
Always includes Meow Wow and Komory Bat recipes

options.name: starting_worlds
options.description: Number of random worlds to start with

options.name: superbosses
options.description:
Determines whether Secret Portals and Julius  are checks
This option is ignored if the Goal is Superbosses

options.name: play_destiny_islands
options.description:
Allows you to play the Ursula battle at the start of the run.
This grants 5 additional checks.
Does nothing if the player chooses Riku as their character.

NOTE: Need to connect to the server before starting a new game
      in order for this to take effect.

options.name: skip_light_cycle
options.description:
Allows you to skip the Light Cycle section of Riku's Grid.
Skipping will still grant the check for clearing the Light Cycle minigame.
Does nothing if the player chooses Sora as their character.

options.name: fast_go_mode
options.description:
When enabled, the save point for Young Xehanort is
activated after collecting the necessary key items,
allowing you to do the final fight instantly without
having to play the entirety of The World That Never Was.

Does nothing if the goal is Superbosses or the player
chooses Sora as their character.

options.name: exp_multiplier
options.description: Determines the multiplier to apply to EXP gained

options.name: stat_bonus
options.description:
Determines how many points each stat increase grants.
Only applies to Strength, Defense, and Magic increases.

options.name: strength_in_pool
options.description:
Determines how many strength increases per character are in the item pool.
Does nothing if Stats On Levels is enabled.

options.name: magic_in_pool
options.description:
Determines how many magic increases per character are in the item pool.
Does nothing if Stats On Levels is enabled.

options.name: defense_in_pool
options.description:
Determines how many defense increases per character are in the item pool.
Does nothing if Stats On Levels is enabled.

options.name: randomize_keyblade_stats
options.description: Determines if Keyblade stats should be randomized

options.name: keyblade_min_str
options.description: Determines the minimum Strength bonus a keyblade can have

options.name: keyblade_max_str
options.description: Determines the maximum Strength bonus a keyblade can have

options.name: keyblade_min_mag
options.description: Determines the minimum Magic bonus a keyblade can have

options.name: keyblade_max_mag
options.description: Determines the maximum Magic bonus a keyblade can have

options.name: instant_drop_trap_chance
options.description: Determines the % chance a filler item gets replaced by an instant drop trap.

options.name: stats_on_levels
options.description: Determines whether level checks contain only stat increases.

options.name: single_flowmotion
options.description: If enabled, all flowmotion is obtained as a single item

options.name: received_notifications
options.description:
Determine how received item notifications are handled
0: Display a notification for every received item
1: Display a notification for received progressive items only
2: Do not display received item notifications

options.name: sent_notifications
options.description:
Determine how sent item notifications are handled
0: Display a notification for every sent item
1: Display a notification for sent progressive items only
2: Do not display sent item notifications

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
